'''boyahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:shadowless|shadowless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shadowless|shadowless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| boyahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:boyahithi|boyahithi]] || [[word:boyahiji|boyahiji]] || [[word:boyahishi|boyahishi]] || [[word:boyahiki|boyahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:boyahuthuthu|boyahuthuthu]] || [[word:boyahujuju|boyahujuju]] || [[word:boyahushushu|boyahushushu]] || [[word:boyahukuku|boyahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:boyahuthu|boyahuthu]] || [[word:boyahuju|boyahuju]] || [[word:boyahushu|boyahushu]] || [[word:boyahuku|boyahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:boyahufthuf|boyahufthuf]] || [[word:boyahufjuf|boyahufjuf]] || [[word:boyahufshuf|boyahufshuf]] || [[word:boyahufkuf|boyahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:boyahethe|boyahethe]] || [[word:boyaheje|boyaheje]] || [[word:boyaheshe|boyaheshe]] || [[word:boyaheke|boyaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:boyahothotho|boyahothotho]] || [[word:boyahojojo|boyahojojo]] || [[word:boyahoshosho|boyahoshosho]] || [[word:boyahokoko|boyahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:boyahotho|boyahotho]] || [[word:boyahojo|boyahojo]] || [[word:boyahosho|boyahosho]] || [[word:boyahoko|boyahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:boyahofthof|boyahofthof]] || [[word:boyahofjof|boyahofjof]] || [[word:boyahofshof|boyahofshof]] || [[word:boyahofkof|boyahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfthÃŸf|boyahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfjÃŸf|boyahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfshÃŸf|boyahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfkÃŸf|boyahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|boyahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|boyahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|boyahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|boyahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfthÃŸf|boyahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfjÃŸf|boyahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfshÃŸf|boyahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfkÃŸf|boyahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfthÃŸf|boyahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfjÃŸf|boyahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfshÃŸf|boyahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:boyahÃŸfkÃŸf|boyahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:boyahÃḊthÃḊ|boyahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:boyahÃḊjÃḊ|boyahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:boyahÃḊshÃḊ|boyahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:boyahÃḊkÃḊ|boyahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:boyahathatha|boyahathatha]] || [[word:boyahajaja|boyahajaja]] || [[word:boyahashasha|boyahashasha]] || [[word:boyahakaka|boyahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:boyahatha|boyahatha]] || [[word:boyahaja|boyahaja]] || [[word:boyahasha|boyahasha]] || [[word:boyahaka|boyahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:boyahafthaf|boyahafthaf]] || [[word:boyahafjaf|boyahafjaf]] || [[word:boyahafshaf|boyahafshaf]] || [[word:boyahafkaf|boyahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:boyahasha|boyahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:boyahshÃḋsha|boyahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:boyahrosha|boyahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:boyahmusha|boyahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:boyahyasha|boyahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goboyahnkshÃḋsha|goboyahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goboyahnkrosha|goboyahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goboyahnkmusha|goboyahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goboyahnkyasha|goboyahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:boyayahasha|boyayahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:boyayahshÃḋsha|boyayahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:boyayahrosha|boyayahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:boyayahmusha|boyayahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:boyayahyasha|boyayahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goboyayahnkshÃḋsha|goboyayahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goboyayahnkrosha|goboyayahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goboyayahnkmusha|goboyayahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goboyayahnkyasha|goboyayahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:beyÃḊhasha|beyÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:beyÃḊhshÃḋsha|beyÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:beyÃḊhrosha|beyÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:beyÃḊhmusha|beyÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:beyÃḊhyasha|beyÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobeyÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|gobeyÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobeyÃḊhnkrosha|gobeyÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobeyÃḊhnkmusha|gobeyÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobeyÃḊhnkyasha|gobeyÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:boyfahasha|boyfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:boyfahshÃḋsha|boyfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:boyfahrosha|boyfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:boyfahmusha|boyfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:boyfahyasha|boyfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goboyfahnkshÃḋsha|goboyfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goboyfahnkrosha|goboyfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goboyfahnkmusha|goboyfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goboyfahnkyasha|goboyfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
